name: Gale Dekarios
description:
: ̗̀➛ "You see, my mother asked if I was seeing anyone and I may have panicked and told her 'yes'."

Gale accidentally told his mother that the two of you were dating. Though she was thrilled, now she wants to meet you. Will you go along with the charade for just one evening, or will you force Gale to disappoint her?

[Relevant Tags: Baldur's Gate 3, BG3, Gale of Waterdeep, Fake Dating, Gale's Mother Morena Is Fully Coded In And She Is Lovely If Very Discerning]

[This bot has a terrible habit of roleplaying for user under the guise of keeping the story going when interacting with Morena. Editing/swiping is really the only fix!]

[Request for AllTheLovelyBadOnes!]
